title: Run Zephyr host sanitizers
description: Scope under project-LICHEN-2auf.59: run ASan and UBSan on every recovered non-link native_sim/native/64 test or application that declares sanitizer compatibility, using the same clean source slices validated by sibling groups. Use profile personal in AWS account 210337117346 and region us-west-2, an owned Project=LICHEN builder in us-west-2c, and only vol-0a95eee8d1d8461eb. Record base/applied commit and binary patch hashes, exact sanitizer/compiler/runtime versions and options, full configure/build/run commands, environment, UTC timing, exits, symbolized reports, logs and binary hashes. An unsupported sanitizer must be documented from the build declaration and fails the required row rather than becoming a skip; any sanitizer report, leak/error suppression added for recovery, timeout, ignored exit, missing symbolization, stale binary, or dirty worktree fails closed. Exclude all .35.6 link-specific gates. Collect/hash reports before sync, unmount, ownership-checked detach, wait-available, and owned-instance cleanup.
acceptance_criteria: Every declared sanitizer-compatible non-link host row runs under both required ASan/UBSan modes with zero findings and exact command/environment evidence; required rows cannot be skipped or replaced by unsanitized runs. Source/patch/compiler/sanitizer provenance, symbolized logs, exits, and artifact hashes are complete; clean-worktree verification passes; account/AZ/exact-volume checks pass; reports are retained before explicit EBS unmount, detach, `aws ec2 wait volume-available`, and ownership-checked instance termination.
